headline: Berkshire Hathaway Is Underperforming, but 4 of Warren Buffett’s Top Picks Are Up Big This Year
summary: Warren Buffett stepped down as CEO of Berkshire Hathaway on December 31, 2025, after six decades leading the conglomerate he transformed from a struggling textile mill into a $1 trillion empire. The “Oracle of Omaha” left his successor, Greg Abel, with a very concentrated portfolio: more than 65% of Berkshire’s $381 billion portfolio is invested ...
